purpose: load_inconsistent_predicate_list's malformed arms, each a distinct exception type at the pin (parse_ipl validates nothing itself): a missing file raises open()'s FileNotFoundError; a YAML document without the 'ipl' key raises KeyError (message is the quoted key, "'ipl'"); a one-element pair raises IndexError 'list index out of range' at labels[1]; and invalid YAML syntax raises yaml.parser.ParserError whose multi-line message embeds the repo-resolved fixture path and parse position — identical for both engines run from this repo, so it compares exactly with no canonicalization.
provenance: docs/surface.md fn:load_inconsistent_predicate_list malformed-missing-ipl-key/malformed-short-pair/malformed-missing-file/malformed-bad-yaml; yaml_parser.py:187-196 at the pin; exception text screened live 2026-07-07
